## Summary

Describe the editorial issue briefly.

## Affected File(s)

List the file(s) involved.

## Current Problem

What is unclear, inconsistent, repetitive, or awkward?

## Suggested Improvement

Provide the suggested wording or explain the desired clarification.

## Is This Normative?

- [ ] No, this is purely editorial
- [ ] I am not sure
- [ ] It may have normative implications

## Additional Notes

Add any context here.
